latest.title: 2 Hidden Businesses to Watch as AI Keeps Heating Up
latest.summary: Despite concerns that AI trends may be peaking, Taiwan Semiconductor's 68% year-over-year revenue growth in June and Meta's expansion of its Louisiana data center to $50+ billion demonstrate sustained momentum in AI infrastructure buildout. The podcast highlights two lesser-known companies positioned to benefit: Comfo.
